title: Add contact/support metadata
body: RSFC-05-2: No contact or support information found. Add a support email or link to Issues in README or codemeta.json.

title: Declare contributors in codemeta.json
body: RSFC-06-2: Contributors not declared. Update codemeta.json to list contributors.

title: Improve descriptive metadata
body: RSFC-04-4: Software descriptive metadata incomplete. Ensure codemeta.json has keywords, programming language, operating system, and application category.

title: Add tests
body: RSFC-14-1/2: No tests found and no test workflow. Add at least basic tests (e.g., component tests with Vitest) and a CI workflow to run them.

title: Link commits to issues
body: RSFC-17-3: Commits not linked to issues. Use issue references in commit messages (e.g., 'fixes #1') for future commits.
